name: Nickel Industries Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$1.0033. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.0044 where 5 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.0033, stop A$0.8959, target A$1.0300. Risk/reward is 0.25:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
